message:
feat: implement delta snapshot tracking and agent mail integration

- robot: implement PrintSnapshotDelta with tracker.StateTracker for --since flag
- robot: add RecordStateChange() and GetStateTracker() helper functions
- agentmail/client: add 30-second availability caching to avoid repeated health checks
- config: add AgentMailConfig struct for server settings
- cli/deps: add Agent Mail service check to deps command

Closes ntm-dvz (P0 task for delta snapshot updates)
